channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Two flee as police arrest suspect with pistol in Oyo
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Oyo State Police Command arrests a suspect with a locally fabricated pistol and illicit drugs in Ibadan; two others flee the scene. Investigation ongoing.
Read More: https://punchng.com/two-flee-as-police-arrest-suspect-with-pistol-in-oyo/

item.title: Lagos arrests mother over child’s alleged drainage waste disposal
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lagos State has arrested a mother for instructing her child to dump waste into a drainage channel, warning parents who encourage Lagos drainage waste viola
Read More: https://punchng.com/lagos-arrests-mother-over-childs-alleged-drainage-waste-disposal/

item.title: Two Gbana-based Nigerians face trial over compatriot’s murder
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Two Nigerians are set to face trial in Ghana for the alleged murder of a compatriot, Nkemujika Uzorchuku Eze, over internet fraud proceeds. Get the details
Read More: https://punchng.com/two-gbana-based-nigerians-face-trial-over-compatriots-murder/

item.title: Firms accelerate NRS e-invoicing integration as deadline nears
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigerian firms are accelerating NRS e-invoicing integration as the deadline for compliance approaches. Learn about the requirements and benefits for busine
Read More: https://punchng.com/firms-accelerate-nrs-e-invoicing-integration-as-deadline-nears/

item.title: Delta posts $19.8bn revenue despite record fuel costs
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Delta Air Lines reported $19.8bn in operating revenue and $1.4bn pre-tax profit in Q2 2026, overcoming record fuel costs due to strong demand.
Read More: https://punchng.com/delta-posts-19-8bn-revenue-despite-record-fuel-costs/

item.title: UNILAG students compete for N450,000 PR prize
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
UNILAG students pitched innovative PR and advertising campaigns at PRADwave 5.0, competing for a N450,000 prize pool and bridging the gap between academia
Read More: https://punchng.com/unilag-students-compete-for-n450000-pr-prize/

item.title: World Bank warns of fragile global food supply
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The World Bank warns of a fragile global food supply due to surging costs, geopolitical friction, and climate threats. Learn how these factors impact food
Read More: https://punchng.com/world-bank-warns-of-fragile-global-food-supply/

item.title: Yobe implements 2025 FG-ASUU agreement, says VC
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Yobe State University announces full implementation of the 2025 FG-ASUU agreement, including payment of all outstanding arrears to academic staff.
Read More: https://punchng.com/yobe-implements-2025-fg-asuu-agreement-says-vc/

item.title: Floods: The worst is yet to come
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Despite warnings, Nigeria faces devastating floods. Learn why governments ignore predictions and what can be done to prevent future tragedies.
Read More: https://punchng.com/floods-the-worst-is-yet-to-come/

item.title: Jega resonates loudly on Electoral Act underbelly
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Former INEC Chairman Attahiru Jega highlights critical flaws in the Electoral Act 2026, urging urgent amendments for credible 2027 elections. Discover the
Read More: https://punchng.com/jega-resonates-loudly-on-electoral-act-underbelly/

item.title: 💦 Why hydration breaks could be here to stay
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: FIFA's mandated three-minute breaks have been a talking point throughout the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: DBI president urges FCC to deploy AI for fair recruitment
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The President and Chief Executive Officer of the Digital Bridge Institute (DBI), David Daser, has urged the Federal Character Commission (FCC) to deploy Artificial Intelligence (AI) and data-driven technologies to improve fairness, transparency and accountability in public sector recruitment. Daser

item.title: UAE condemns Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as US launches fresh strikes
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The third consecutive night of US strikes on Iran came as Trump announced a 20% charge as part of a new blockade on the strait.

item.title: NUT demands security beef up around schools, implementation of Safe School initiative
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Nigeria Union of Teachers (NUT) has called for the full implementation of the Safe Schools Initiative, deployment of adequate security personnel and surveillance systems to vulnerable schools, improved intelligence gathering and community-based security mechanisms The post NUT demands security beef

item.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

item.title: Seidler Equity Is Looking to Sell Stake in 139-Year-Old Baseball Gear Maker Rawlings
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The private equity owner of Rawlings Sporting Goods Co., one of the oldest makers of baseball apparel and equipment, is exploring the sale of its stake in the company in an effort to tap booming investor demand for sports-related investments.

item.title: 2027: Olu Martins writes NDC leader, Dickson, demands zoning equity in Edo Central
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) for the Esan West Constituency seat in the Edo State House of Assembly, Reverend Leo Olu Martins, has sent an expository message to the party’s National Leader, Senator Seriake Dickson, as preparations for the 2027 general elections gather momentum.

item.title: Intrusion of diurnal presidential council into govt parastatals
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: THE security guard stood at attention, straightened instinctively and raised his hand in salute as the black Mercedes Benz glided past the checkpoint into the sprawling government complexes in Abuja: “Good morning, Director General,” he showed a sign of respect in military style. Inside the stately

item.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

item.title: FG, GIZ Reaffirm Partnership to Advance Housing, Urban Devt
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: The federal government and the German Agency for International Development (GIZ) have  committed to forging stronger partnerships to accelerate the delivery of affordable housing, sustainable urban development and inclusive communities

item.title: Middle East live: US strikes Iran for third night as Trump says deal still 'possible'
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: The United States launched a fresh salvo of strikes against Iran early Tuesday, marking a new escalation in the resumption of hostilities, even as US President Donald Trump said a deal with Tehran was still possible. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Peter Uzoho Group Managing Director of Levene Energies Limited, Nneka Arowolo, has stated that Nigeria will not attract the billions of dollars needed to develop gas infrastructure and accelerate supply

item.title: Norway ‘rows’ at the royal palace to welcome back World Cup heroes
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: More than 100,000 people turned out to celebrate Norway's national football team after their World Cup exit.

item.title: Dangote Offers N500,000 Reward to Curb Illegal Use of Company Trucks
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Stories by Emmanuel Addeh in Abuja Dangote Industries Limited has launched a whistleblower initiative offering a cash reward of N500,000 to members of the public who provide credible information leading

item.title: Independent Producers Seek More Reforms to Unlock Nigeria’s Oil, Gas Sector
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Peter Uzoho  The Independent Petroleum Producers Group (IPPG) has called for bold, coordinated reforms to reposition Nigeria’s oil and gas industry from a resource-based economy to a globally competitive engine

item.title: Sources: United in advanced talks for Tielemans
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Manchester United are in advanced talks to sign Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa, sources have told ESPN.

item.title: United seal $64M Santos move, Ederson's stalls
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Manchester United have signed midfielder Andrey Santos from Chelsea, the club have announced.

item.title: Haaland, Norway return home to heroes' welcome
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Erling Haaland and his Norway teammates were welcomed home by a crowd of thousands following their historic World Cup achievements in North America.

item.title: Revs re-sign USMNT's Turner on loan from Lyon
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The New England Revolution announced on Monday that it has extended the loan of United States men's national team goalkeeper Matt Turner from Ligue 1 side Lyon through the end of 2026.

item.title: Alonso wants Enzo Fernández to stay at Chelsea
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Chelsea manager Xabi Alonso has said he wants to keep Enzo Fernández at the club amid a potential exit this summer.

item.title: Police investigating death of South Africa's Adams...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Police said Monday they are investigating the death of South Africa World Cup football player Jayden Adams, after his body was discovered this weekend at a property in the city of Cape Town.

item.title: Source: Villa's Digne agrees deal for PSG return
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain have agreed a deal with Lucas Digne to bring the Aston Villa defender back to Paris after paying his £10 million ($13.3m) release clause, a source told ESPN.

item.title: USWNT to host world No. 1 Spain twice in October
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The United States women's national team will host world No. 1 and reigning World Cup champions Spain in a pair of friendly matches in October, U.S. Soccer announced on Monday.

item.description: President Asiwaju Bola Ahmed Tinubu’s decision to retain Vice President Kashim Shettima as his running mate for the 2027 presidential election is both a political and strategic calculation. Rather than

item.title: Peter Obi, Mario Balotelli and ‘Why Always Me’
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: ‘Why always me’. If you have been a lover of football, a tweenager [young adults in their twenties] or an adult, the meme that we started with in this paragraph will not surprise you. This will be more so if you have been an ardent follower of the English Premier League, the most branded, marketed

item.title: Shettima breathes again, for now
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Long before Kashim Shettima became vice president to President Bola Tinubu in 2023, the office of vice president has been contending with travails. Actually, tribulations are inherent in the office of vice president. Ask Spiro Agnew, the 39th vice president of the United States of America who served

item.title: Dingyadi hails NSITF reforms, partnership with Gambia
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Minister for Labour and Employment, Dr Muhammadu Maigari Dingyadi, has commended the Managing Director/CE of the Nigeria Social Insurance Trust Fund (NSITF), Barr. Oluwaseun Faleye, for the reforms he has instituted at the fund. He made the commendation when the Managing Director led the delegat

item.title: Dala Dry Inland Port Scandal: Court Affirms Rights Of Journalist Refusal Of Source Of Information
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: A Federal High Court sitting in Kano has upheld the rights of Journalists in refusing to disclose the source of their information, unless in a matter of breach of National Security or has a direct link to the case. In the same vein, the court affirmed its powers to subpoena a journalist to give evid

item.dc:creator: Hacker News

item.title: Brazil’s Oncoclinicas Said to File for Out-of-Court Debt Rework
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Oncoclinicas do Brasil Servicos Medicos SA is preparing to file for an out-of-court debt restructuring, which could come as soon as Monday night, according to people familiar with the matter.

item.title: Trump says to deliver 'speech to the nation' Thursday as Iran tensions escalate
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: US President Donald Trump said on Monday he will deliver a prime-time address to the nation on Thursday, without disclosing the topic. The announcement came hours after Trump said he would reimpose a US naval blockade on Iran and impose a 20% fee on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Spurs latest: Inter Milan interested in Spence
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football

item.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

item.title: I Stopped Partying To Make My Movie Gross ₦2.7bn– Funke Akindele
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: ‎Nollywood actress and film maker, Funke Akindele has opened up about the sacrifices she made for her latest movie, Behind The Scenes, which has grossed N2.7 billion. While speaking with Bella Naija, she said she put herself very busy and gave her all. According to her, she abandoned herself for wor

item.title: Shein’s Slowing Growth Risks Weighing on Hong Kong IPO Valuation
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Shein has finally won long-awaited Chinese regulatory approval for its planned Hong Kong listing, but slowing business growth threatens to weigh on the valuation it can command in the initial public offering.

item.title: India’s Beaten-Down Large Caps Set to Rebound on Foreign Flows
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: India’s large-cap stocks are set to narrow their underperformance to smaller peers, supported by the return of foreign investors, an improving earnings outlook and attractive valuations, according to strategists.

item.title: Lagos Resident Commends Emergency Responders For Saving Seven-Month-Old Daughter
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: A resident of Badagry, Lagos State, Muhammad Armayau, has praised the Lagos State emergency response system for its swift intervention in saving the life of his seven-month-old daughter after she suddenly fell ill in the middle of the night. Armayau, who spoke with journalists on Monday, recounted t

item.title: France counterattack, Argentina set pieces: How Wo...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: We're down to the final four of the World Cup, with the four top-ranked teams set to square off. Yet all of them use very different attacking styles in order to score goals; let's break it down.

item.title: Get ready for the semifinals! What you need to kno...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: With only a week to go until the final of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, there are now just four teams still harboring dreams of becoming world champions.

item.title: Stakeholders Urge Dedicated Nutrition Budget In Bauchi LGs
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Local Government Chairmen in Bauchi State have been urged to prioritise domestic funding for nutrition programmes to sustain the progress recorded in improving the health and wellbeing of women and children. The appeal was made by the State Chairperson, Civil Society Scaling Up Nutrition in Nigeria

item.title: The U.S. is maxing out its strategic oil reserves as Trump vows to control the Strait of Hormuz
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Strategic Petroleum Reserve stockpiles are precariously low and have been hit by major equipment failures, leaks and spills, according to a government report.

item.title: Court Did Not Nullify ADC Primaries, Atiku Insists, Heads To Supreme Court
item.dc:creator: Leadership

item.title: Senate Probes N34trn Import Duty Waivers, Threatens Sanctions For 14 Defaulting MDAs
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Senate Committee on Finance, on Monday, launched an investigation into the Federal Government’s issuance of Import Duty Exemption Certificates (IDECs) valued at about ₦34 trillion, as part of a wider probe into revenue leakages and remittance failures by federal agencies. The committee also issu

item.title: 'Hero, legend, sweetheart': Tributes to Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill, who has died aged 78
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Friends, politicians and fellow film stars remember Neill following his "sudden and unexpected" death.

item.description: Governor Ademola Adeleke has advocated economic sanctions and visa bans on Blue Marine Minister, Gboyega Oyetola; Senator representing Osun East Senatorial District, Francis Fadahunsi; All Progressives Congress (APC) Gubernatorial candidate Asiwaju Bola Oyebamiji; Hon. Wole Oke; and some leaders. Th

item.title: EDITORIAL: Beyond the Oyo rescue: It’s time to make Nigeria’s schools truly safe
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Schools should never become hunting grounds for criminals. Children go to school to learn, not to live in fear. Teachers go to classrooms to build the future of the nation, not to risk being taken hostage. If parents begin to fear sending their children to school, the country's education system will

item.title: Backed by Trump, Lindsey Graham’s sister Darline will replace him in Senate
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: South Carolina governor chooses Darline Graham Nordone to serve the rest of the late US senator's term until early 2027.

item.title: Nine deaths tied to Trump’s immigration enforcement operations in US
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Fatal shooting in Biddeford, Maine, is latest in at least nine deaths linked to US president's immigration crackdown.

item.description: Kaduna State Governor, Uba Sani, has approved new appointments to key government positions and boards as part of efforts to strengthen governance and accelerate his administration’s transformative agenda. The appointments, announced on Monday, July 13, 2026, by the Chief Press Secretary to the Gover

item.title: Nigeria’s Envoy Presents Letter of Credence to Malaysia Foreign Ministry
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Nigeria’s High Commissioner-Designate to Malaysia, Ambassador Ahmed Olatunji Sulu Gambari, has formally commenced his diplomatic assignment in Kuala Lumpur after presenting copies of his Letters of Credence to the Malaysian Ministry of Foreign Affairs. The Ministry of Foreign Affairs disclosed this

item.title: Import Duty Waivers Hit N34tn In 2025, Customs Tells Senate
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Comptroller-General of the Nigeria Customs Service (NCS), Bashir Adewale Adeniyi, has disclosed that the value of Import Duty Exemption Certificate (IDEC) approvals rose to about N34 trillion in 2025, significantly affecting the service’s revenue generation. Adeniyi made the disclosure on

item.title: Alli Donates Brand-New Car To Kidnapped Oriire School Principal

item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship candidate in Oyo State, Senator Sharafadeen Alli, has donated a brand-new Toyota Camry to Mrs Rachael Folake Alamu, the Principal of Community High School, Esiele, Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State, in recognition of her courage and resilience

item.title: Why a borrowing binge by investors is a warning sign for the stock market
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Investors are increasingly borrowing to buy stocks, a reflection of greed in the stock market as they seek to amplify returns with margin debt. The growing pile of borrowed money has some on Wall Street nervous.

item.title: Tinubu, Gowon, Others Say Buhari Put Nigeria Above Personal Interest

item.description: President Bola Tinubu, has said the late immediate past president of Nigeria, Muhammadu Buhari gave everything he had to the country without reservation. item.title: Gold Miners Cadillac, Amapa Minerals Add to Canada IPO Rebound
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Cadillac Mines Corp. and Amapa Minerals Holdings Inc. filed for initial public offerings, in the latest sign that the pace of Canadian listings is starting to pick up.

item.title: 'Easy to create divisions' - Kane says England are 'completely together'
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: England captain Harry Kane says the squad are "completely together" before their World Cup semi-final against Argentina.

item.description: The company has shed more than $800 billion in market value from its $2.67 trillion peak in less than a month.

item.title: Oil Extends Advance, Asian Stocks Set to Decline: Markets Wrap
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Oil extended gains and Asian stocks were set to track Wall Street lower after the standoff between the US and Iran intensified, raising concerns that disruptions to energy supplies could accelerate inflation.

item.title: Court receives update on discovery of missing casefile linking police officers to businessman’s disappearance
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The IGP and police authorities have refused to comply with the court's September 2025 judgement ordering them to release the casefile to the businessman's spouse and prosecute some police officers implicated in the man's disappearance. The post Court receives update on discovery of missing casefile

item.title: Oil Extends Gains as Trump Reinstates Blockade on Iranian Ships
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Oil extended gains after surging more than 9% on Monday, as US President Donald Trump reimposed a blockade on Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded payment for all other cargo moving through the vital waterway.

item.title: MACBAN Denies Members’ Involvement In Otukpo Killings
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Benue State chapter of the Miyetti Allah Cattle Breeders Association of Nigeria (MACBAN) has exonerated its members from the recent killings of ten residents in Otukpo-Nobi, Otukpo Local Government Area of the State. MACBAN while condemning the killings urged the public not to attribute responsi

item.title: Abducted Oyo headmaster regains freedom — Police
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Oyo State Police Command has confirmed the release of a kidnapped headmaster, Mathew Owoade, after sustained security operations forced his abductors to abandon him. The post Abducted Oyo headmaster regains freedom — Police appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: US judge voids Donald Trump 'improper' $1.8 billion settlement with IRS
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: A US judge on Monday voided a settlement between President Donald Trump and the Internal Revenue Service over leaked tax returns, ruling the lawsuit was filed for an "improper purpose." The agreement had granted Trump, his family and business broad protections from tax audits following their $10 bil

item.title: Uba Sani Approves Key Appointments To Boost Governance In Kaduna
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Governor Sani congratulated the new appointees and urged them to regard their appointments as a call to public service. The post Uba Sani Approves Key Appointments To Boost Governance In Kaduna appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Makinde Urges UN, International Community To Probe Oyo School Abduction
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The last may not have been heard about the abduction of Oyo school children and their teachers, as the state Governor, Seyi Makinde on Monday called on the United Nations and international human rights organisations to conduct full scale independent investigation into the abduction of schoolchildren

item.title: Microsoft tests Windows Search without all the ads and fluff
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Microsoft is testing a cleaner version of the Windows 11 search menu that strips it of recommended content and ads. In a blog post on Monday, Microsoft announced that it's rolling out the decluttered Search Box to Windows Insiders in the Experimental channel as the company looks to regain trust with
